scripts.test: DATABASE_URL=file:./test.db node prisma/ensure-sqlite.cjs && DATABASE_URL=file:./test.db prisma db push --force-reset --skip-generate && DATABASE_URL=file:./test.db node prisma/seed.cjs && DATABASE_URL=file:./test.db vitest run
scripts.db:setup: DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL:-file:./dev.db} node prisma/ensure-sqlite.cjs && DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL:-file:./dev.db} prisma db push && DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL:-file:./dev.db} node prisma/seed.cjs
